Navbar Menu

You can use the arrow keys to navigate through the menu items.

  • Tractive for Dogs

    • DOG 6

      For dogs above 4 kg. Battery: up to 2 weeks.

    • DOG 6 XL

      New

      For dogs above 20 kg. Battery: up to 6 weeks.

  • Tractive for Cats

    • CAT 6 Mini

      New

      For cats 3-8 kg. Battery: up to 7 days. Collar-integrated.

    • CAT Mini

      For cats above 3 kg. Battery: up to 5 days.

    Learn more about our features

    • GPS Tracking

      Track your pet's real-time location
    • Health Monitoring

      Get health insights to spot potential issues early
    • Virtual Fences

      Get alerts if your pet wanders too far
    • Power Saving Zones

      Extend your tracker's battery life
    • Bark Monitoring

      Detect signs of separation anxiety
    • Danger Reports

      Spot and report pet risks in your area

Join our team

Why Tractive?
Because we do things differently.

We’re a welcoming, international team that cares about your ideas. Enjoy a 4-day workweek, hybrid setup, and a culture of trust and ownership.

Apply Now
Positions

Find your perfect fit

Team
Position
Job Type
Location
Hardware & Firmware
Senior RF Systems Engineer (IoT)
Full-time (4 days, 35h/week)
Linz, Austria

Don’t see a role that fits?

Connect with us and be the first to know about open positions!

Connect Now

Departments

Job location

Benefits

Work Your Way

Recharge and replenish with a 3-day weekend.

Enjoy the best of both worlds: work 1-2 days a week (depending on your team) in the office and the rest from home.

With core hours from 9 am to 3 pm, you’ll have the flexibility to structure your day.

Because We Care

Pets are family too. Welcome your new dog into the family with 3 days of paid pawternity leave.

Your well-being matters to us. From fitness to emotional health, we’ll cover 50% of the cost of services that support you.

Travel throughout Austria with the Klimaticket. Let us cover half the cost.

Moving abroad to work at Tractive? We'll help you find your footing with relocation support.

Grow With Us

Stay curious with a learning budget that supports your growth and development.

Expect constructive, actionable, and growth-focused feedback to help you succeed.

Develop personally and professionally in an international team to diversify your perspective.

Apply Now
Campus Tour

Step inside and see why our team loves coming to the office!

Our Team

Tractive in numbers

2012

Tractive founded

Our journey began in 2012 in Pasching, Austria. Since then, we've only gotten stronger and more global!

270+

Team Members

Our 270+ team members work every day to help pet owners keep their furry friends safe.

40+

Nationalities

Our diverse team is one of our greatest strengths. We’re proud to be a team made up of different nationalities.

Our Values

Our values keep us focused on creating the best products for pets and their humans.

  • We put pet parents first, always.

    We do whatever it takes to make pet parents (and their furry friends) happy.

  • We keep it real.

    We choose the honest conversation over the easy one. Being real with each other isn’t just a “nice to have”— it’s how we grow.

  • We make things happen.

    We're a team of doers. Every team member has the space and trust to take ownership, step up, and make a real difference.

  • We can do it.

    Whatever comes our way, we focus on how we can make it happen—not why we can’t.

  • We keep things efficient.

    Efficiency is key. We make decisions based on data, focus on what really matters, and use tools like AI to work smarter.

    • Apply Now

Team Voices

Hear from our team

At Tractive, we dive headfirst into the latest tools like GitHub Co-Pilot, ChatGPT, VSCode, CMake, and CI/CD pipelines. Being part of a team that values staying ahead in technology makes every day exciting and dynamic.

Ligo

Firmware

My proudest moment is watching my team tackle challenges independently. I’m fortunate to work with such talented individuals, and seeing their achievements brings me immense pride.

Marlene

Human Resources

Teamwork is the driving force behind our innovation! With strong support from management, brilliant professionals come together to create something we’re all proud of. As Project Manager, my role is simple: align everyone and let them work their magic.

Evgenii

Hardware

I started at Tractive right after my studies—and I’d definitely do it again! Working alongside professionals in a supportive environment gave me the perfect start and allowed me to grow into my career.

Sarah

Marketing & Sales

It’s humbling to know how many people use the product we’re building. Even small changes can make a big difference in the lives of hundreds of thousands of pet owners.

Daniel

Product

After 13 years of C/C++ programming, I thought I knew it all. Tractive quickly proved me wrong—my first few months taught me more than the previous years combined!

Peter

Firmware

Since I started at Tractive, I’ve always felt heard. Whether in feedback talks or sharing suggestions for improvements, they are always actively considered and discussed within our team.

Martina

Data

My golden rule is to lead with empathy and honesty. The more individual and meaningful your feedback is, the more your team can grow and improve.

Miriam

Marketing & Sales

Tractive's family-friendly culture gives me the freedom to plan my week around both work and family. I can pick up my child from school or enjoy a family lunch—without missing a beat at work. That kind of trust is truly invaluable.

Dominik

Management

FAQs

Looking for answers? You've come to the right place.

How can I apply to Tractive?

The best way to join the #TrackPack is by applying directly here on our Tractive Careers page.
And, if you don't see a role that fits, you can still connect with us here to be the first to know about open positions.

Do you have any tips for the application and interview?

We love when candidates include a motivation letter. Highlight your skills, experience, and why Tractive excites you. During the interview, keep it authentic—show us who you are and what you can do.
For more tips on mastering your application, check out our blog article: The Tractive Hiring Process.

What does the Tractive hiring process look like?

From the first outreach, we aim to create a positive and memorable candidate experience. Expect an engaging conversation, timely responses, and helpful feedback.
Dive into our blog for the full breakdown: Welcome To The Tractive Candidate Experience.

What does the Tractive Onboarding look like?

We set you up for success from day one. See what your first weeks at Tractive look like in our blog: Onboarding at Tractive.

How does Tractive support relocation?

When you relocate to Austria for Tractive, you won't do it alone. Learn how we help you navigate through the process in our blog: Relocation With Tractive.

Apply Now

Tractive App

Get peace of mind on the go with the free Tractive app.

* Tractive is not a medical device. While Tractive monitors trends and patterns in your pet’s well-being, it is not intended to diagnose health conditions. We recommend always seeking medical advice from a vet.
